chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2780 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 07.09.2022 Mr. Imran Ashraf Panhwar advocate for petitioners along with petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh and Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh along with SIP/SHO Ayaz Hussain PS Dehi District Badin and SIP/SHOI Shahzad Kazi PS Hoosri. ----- Petitioner No.1 has stated that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own freewill and choice but against wishes of her parents hence being annoyed respondent No.5 has got subject F.I.R. lodged which is based on wrong facts. On court’s direction she has also had a meeting with her parents for a quite considerable time. I.O is present who has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 in which she has reiterated the same facts. The I.O submits that in the light of her statement, he would dispose of this case and would submit such report before the learned Magistrate concerned. After such report is submitted, learned Magistrate concerned shall pass an appropriate order on said report in the light of recommendation of the I.O. disposing of the case, in accordance with law. Petitioners and their counsel are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above. Police official present is directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE
